text.title: Agents Safety Guardrails — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output config.

list.item: Input: Tool list.
Action: List every tool with side-effects; classify (reversible / irreversible).
Output: tools-classification.csv.
Decision gate: If unclear, treat as irreversible until proven otherwise.
Input: Cost budget, latency SLO.
Action: Set numeric caps for execution, financial, content guardrails.
Output: guardrails.yaml with per-category section.
Decision gate: If unsure of a threshold, pick conservative; loosen later with data.
Input: Irreversible-actions list.
Action: For each irreversible tool, add human approval gate (e.g., Slack approval message).
Output: Human gate active on every irreversible tool.
Decision gate: If approval latency is too high, narrow the irreversible list.
Input: Trip handlers.
Action: For each guardrail, define recovery (block, ask human, downscale, kill).
Output: Per-guardrail recovery section.
Decision gate: If recovery path unclear, escalate to safety review.
Input: Guardrail tests + telemetry.
Action: Synthetic tests for each trip; production telemetry for trip counts.
Output: Per-guardrail dashboard.
Decision gate: If a guardrail never trips, audit its threshold; if it trips constantly, threshold is too tight.
